options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=${APP_PATH} STACK_NAME=${STACK_NAME} DOMAIN=${DOMAIN} MAX_RESULTS=${MAX_RESULTS:-50} FAILED_ONLY=${FAILED_ONLY:-0} node dist/libs/admin/admin-stack-events/get-stack-events.mjs

NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 AWS_PROFILE=hepe-admin-mfa AWS_REGION=us-east-1 BACKUP_FILE=dist/backups/askdaokapra/dns/2025-09-15T12-02-36-000Z/dns-backup-20250915-120236.json APP_PATH=apps/cdk-askdaokapra DRY_RUN=0 node dist/libs/admin/admin-dns-restore/restore-miab.mjs

NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 AWS_PROFILE=hepe-admin-mfa AWS_REGION=us-east-1 BACKUP_FILE=dist/backups/askdaokapra/dns/2025-09-15T12-02-36-000Z/dns-backup-20250915-120236.json APP_PATH=apps/cdk-askdaokapra DRY_RUN=1 node dist/libs/admin/admin-dns-restore/restore-miab.mjs

if [ "$FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED" != "1" ]; then echo "ERROR: FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 required for deployment"; exit 1; fi && node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js deploy --require-approval never ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN} ${INSTANCE_DNS:+--context instanceDns=$INSTANCE_DNS} ${CORE_PARAM_PREFIX:+--context coreParamPrefix=$CORE_PARAM_PREFIX}

if [ "$FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED" != "1" ]; then echo "ERROR: FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 required for deployment"; exit 1; fi && node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js destroy --force ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN} ${INSTANCE_DNS:+--context instanceDns=$INSTANCE_DNS} ${CORE_PARAM_PREFIX:+--context coreParamPrefix=$CORE_PARAM_PREFIX}

AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=${APP_PATH} STACK_NAME=${STACK_NAME} DOMAIN=${DOMAIN} DRY_RUN=${DRY_RUN:-0} node dist/libs/admin/admin-s3-empty/empty-buckets.mjs

if [ "$FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED" != "1" ]; then echo "ERROR: FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 required for deployment"; exit 1; fi && node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js deploy --require-approval never ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN}

if [ "$FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED" != "1" ]; then echo "ERROR: FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 required for deployment"; exit 1; fi && if [ -n "$DOMAIN" ] && [ "$DOMAIN" != "emcnotary.com" ]; then echo "Note: Emptying buckets for domain $DOMAIN"; DOMAIN=$DOMAIN APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty || true; else pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty:emcnotary || true; fi && node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js destroy --force ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN}

if [ "$FEATURE_INSTANCE_BOOTSTRAP_ENABLED" = "0" ]; then echo "ERROR: FEATURE_INSTANCE_BOOTSTRAP_ENABLED=0 - Bootstrap is disabled"; exit 1; fi && ts-node tools/instance-bootstrap.cli.ts --domain=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} --region=${CDK_DEFAULT_REGION:-us-east-1} ${STACK:+--stack=$STACK} ${PROFILE:+--profile=$PROFILE} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run} ${RESTORE_PREFIX:+--restore-prefix=$RESTORE_PREFIX} ${REBOOT_AFTER_SETUP:+--reboot}
